headlines.summary: The first new oil sands project in Alberta since 2014 has started commercial production, aiming for a daily average of 80,000 barrels once it ramps up. headlines.title: Germany Considers Extending Oil Reserve Relief Despite Falling Prices
headlines.summary: Germany may be getting cold feet about ending its oil reserve waiver. Berlin said this week it is considering extending a temporary reduction in national oil stockpiling requirements beyond the current August 31 deadline, even as markets celebrate the U.S.-Iran agreement and the

headlines.title: How the U.S.-Iran Deal Put A Higher Floor Under Oil Prices
headlines.summary: Analysts are back to expecting a huge oil glut next year as they see the U.S.-Iran deal as the end of the worst of the Middle East crisis. The deal is actually just the beginning of long processes of negotiations, a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, recovery of the more than 13

headlines.title: OPEC’s Oil Demand Bet Is on India, Not Europe
headlines.summary: Every year, OPEC releases a long-term outlook that says oil demand will keep growing. Every year, critics roll their eyes. This year, OPEC doubled down. In its World Oil Outlook 2026, the producer group said global oil demand will climb from 105.1 million barrels per day in 2025

headlines.title: Oil Prices Are Crashing. Inventories Tell A Different Story.
